title: $2,500 That Grows Monthly
author: ColdWinterDaze
selftext:
Hello, everyone!

I know this might sound like an advertisement, but I just can't contain my excitement.

If you have some spare cash and would like to double it in about a week, I highly recommend reading this Reddit post by this awesome guy (u/crowjudgement).

It's pinned right on his profile.

I made about $300 today myself, so I know what I'm talking about.

Hope this helps! Love and peace.

comments.author: SecureWriting8589
comments.body:
# SCAM WARNING

The original post is nothing but an invitation to be scammed. Do not trust or believe the poster and definitely do not follow their suggestions. Instead, read the post so that you know the scam well and will recognize it and avoid it in the future. Also, vote up or down on the post as you see fit. Give it the reputation points that it deserves.
